title: eragrostis minor var. megastachya
intro: Eragrostis minor var. megastachya, commonly known as little love grass, is a type of grass native to Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Eragrostis minor var. megastachya has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
